title: erigeron formosissimus var. viscidus
intro: Erigeron formosissimus var. viscidus, commonly known as a type of fleabane or daisy, is a flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Erigeron formosissimus var. viscidus include its potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
